auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Cincopa API token sent as the api_token query parameter.

actions.name: list_asset_tags
actions.description: List the asset tag cloud available in a Cincopa account.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Cincopa asset tags.

tagCloud.description: Mapping of Cincopa tag names to item counts.

actions.name: list_assets
actions.description: List assets from a Cincopa account with optional metadata filters.

search.description: Free-text search term for asset metadata.

types.description: Asset types to include, such as image, video, audio, or other.

rid.description: Exact Cincopa RID to search for.

referenceId.description: Exact Cincopa reference_id to search for.

details.description: Metadata field names to request from Cincopa for each asset row.

page.description: Result page number to request from Cincopa.

itemsPerPage.description: Maximum number of assets to request in one page.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing assets from a Cincopa account.

items.description: One raw Cincopa row returned by the upstream API.

page.description: The current result page returned by Cincopa.

itemsPerPage.description: The number of rows requested per page.

itemsCount.description: The total number of rows available for the current query.

pageCount.description: The total number of pages available for the current query.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Cincopa list endpoints.

actions.name: list_galleries
actions.description: List galleries from a Cincopa account with optional search and tag filters.

search.description: Search term matched against gallery captions, descriptions, IDs, and tags.

page.description: Result page number to request from Cincopa.

itemsPerPage.description: Maximum number of galleries to request in one page.

filterTags.description: Gallery tags to include or exclude. Prefix a value with '-' to exclude it.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing galleries from a Cincopa account.

workspace.description: Workspace name returned by Cincopa for the request context.

items.description: One raw Cincopa row returned by the upstream API.

tagCloud.description: Mapping of Cincopa tag names to item counts.

page.description: The current result page returned by Cincopa.

itemsPerPage.description: The number of rows requested per page.

itemsCount.description: The total number of rows available for the current query.

pageCount.description: The total number of pages available for the current query.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by Cincopa list endpoints.

actions.name: list_gallery_items
actions.description: List items from one Cincopa gallery by FID.

fid.description: The Cincopa gallery FID to inspect.

details.description: Metadata field names to request from Cincopa for each gallery item.

page.description: Result page number to request from Cincopa.

itemsPerPage.description: Maximum number of gallery items to request in one page.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing items inside one Cincopa gallery.

fid.description: The gallery FID returned by Cincopa.

uploadUrl.description: The upload URL returned for the gallery.

claimed.description: The gallery claim marker returned by Cincopa.

spfid.description: The secondary gallery identifier returned by Cincopa.

items.description: One raw Cincopa row returned by the upstream API.
Gallery item rows returned by Cincopa.

page.description: The current result page returned by Cincopa.

itemsPerPage.description: The number of rows requested per page.

itemsCount.description: The total number of rows available for the current query.
